import asyncio
from source import AsyncCounter, run_race

def test_concurrent_increments_race_condition():
    async def test_race():
        counter = AsyncCounter()
        tasks = [counter.increment() for _ in range(50)]
        await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
        assert counter.count == 50, f"Expected count 50, got {counter.count} - race condition detected"
    
    result = asyncio.run(test_race())
